headline: Constellation Energy Balances DOE Reliability Order With New Gas And Solar Capacity
summary: U.S. Department of Energy directs Constellation Energy (NasdaqGS:CEG) to keep Eddystone Generating Station Units 3 and 4 online through August 2026 to reduce blackout risk. The order delays the planned retirement of the Pennsylvania units and extends their role in regional grid reliability. Constellation brings the 460 MW Pin Oak Creek Energy Center into commercial operation to supply natural gas fired power to Texas. The company also commissions a large scale solar project serving...
